Also offers a sexually transmitted disease clinic. 610 W 3rd Street Dorris, CA 96023 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (530) 999-9070 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MOUNTAIN VALLEYS HEALTH CENTERS HEALTH CENTERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary care, urgent care, minor surgery, prenatal care, immunizations, family planning, and a sexually transmitted disease clinic. 498 Main Street Tulelake, CA 96134 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (530) 999-9060 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT STD CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides evaluation and treatment of sexually transmitted infections. Services include testing for gonorrhea, chlamydia, syphilis, vaginal infections like yeast or bacterial vaginosis, trichomoniasis, hepatitis C (if injected drugs were ever used), HIV, HPV (visual check for genital warts only, no treatment offered), and herpes (visual check only). Also offers hepatitis A and B vaccinations for individuals receiving a full STD screening. If you have chlamydia, gonorrhea, syphilis, or HIV, treatment is available, even if you were diagnosed at another clinic. Testing and treatment is also available to your partners. 619 NW 6th Avenue Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4:30pm Email (503) 988-3700 Get Directions Visit
